summary: UI Polish Testing - All layout fixes verified successfully. Single marquee row confirmed, heading typography upgraded, spacing tightened, HowItWorks grid-cols-3 working, all sections properly aligned.
critical_code_review_comments: Single marquee row correctly implemented (1 Marquee container, not 2)
All section headings use font-heading with text-3xl/4xl/5xl font-bold text-display
Section padding reduced appropriately (py-12/py-16 instead of py-24/py-32)
HowItWorks grid properly set to md:grid-cols-3 (352px 352px 352px)
Divider component added between sections with subtle gradient styling
Pricing cards properly aligned with Growth tier highlighted ('Most Popular' badge)
Footer 4-column layout properly structured (Brand, Product, Company, Legal)
Early Access Modal opens correctly with form elements (email, company, role)
Mobile responsive - hamburger menu and overlay working on 390px viewport
Hero section reduced height (140vh per code review)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI polish pass completed. All layout fixes verified: (1) Single marquee row - confirmed 1 .rfm-marquee-container, (2) Heading typography - all sections have font-heading text-3xl/4xl/5xl font-bold (Integrations 36px/700, HowItWorks 48px/700, Outcomes 48px/700, CTA 48px/700, Pricing 48px/700, FAQ 48px/700), (3) Spacing tightened with py-12/py-16 classes, (4) HowItWorks 3-column grid working (md:grid-cols-3), (5) Divider lines visible between sections, (6) Problem section 3 bento cards aligned, (7) Pricing 3 cards with Growth highlighted, (8) FAQ 5 accordion items functional, (9) Footer 4-column layout correct, (10) Mobile hamburger menu working, (11) Early Access Modal opens from nav CTA with all form elements.
passed_tests: Integrations: Single marquee row (1 container, not 2 rows)
Problem section: 3 bento cards properly aligned
HowItWorks: 3 step cards in md:grid-cols-3 (352px x 3)
CTA headline: 48px bold with gradient accent
Pricing: Growth tier highlighted with 'Most Popular' badge
Divider lines: Subtle horizontal dividers between sections
Navigation: Sticky header with glass effect on scroll
Early Access Modal: Opens from nav CTA button
Early Access Modal: Form elements (email, company, role, submit)
Mobile: Hamburger menu visible on 390px viewport
Mobile: Overlay opens with nav links and CTA
